user.title: Create room
user.description:
Enter a name for the room.

{configuration_status}

data_description.room_name:
Allowed characters: a-z, A-Z, 0-9, _ or -
Length: 1-50 characters

Examples: GrowRoom1, grow_box, Grow-Room-1
data_description.auto_configure_ha: When enabled, OpenGrowBox adds missing logger diagnostics to configuration.yaml and creates a backup before writing.

error.invalid_room_name: Invalid room name. Only letters (a-z, A-Z), numbers (0-9), underscores (_) and hyphens (-) are allowed.
error.invalid_length: Room name must be between 1 and 50 characters long.
error.required_logger_missing: Required logger settings are missing. Enable automatic updates or update configuration.yaml manually before continuing.

abort.required_logger_missing: Required logger settings are missing. Enable automatic updates or update configuration.yaml manually before continuing.

data_description.auto_configure_ha: When enabled, OpenGrowBox adds missing logger diagnostics to configuration.yaml and creates a backup before writing.
